items.prompt: solves bounded percent change, discount, tax, and markup situations accurately
items.expected_evidence: compute a percent amount and combine it correctly with an original quantity when the context requires increase or decrease
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies the original value, computes the percent amount, and forms the correct resulting value.

items.prompt: explains how original amount, percent rate, and resulting amount are multiplicatively related in tax, discount, markup, or percent-change situations
items.expected_evidence: explain why discount and tax are structurally similar but directionally different applications of percent
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains the multiplicative structure of the percent application coherently.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to result_direction_confusion.
items.expected_evidence: distinguish original amount, percent amount, and resulting amount in bounded change problems
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies how the peer applied the percent amount in the wrong direction or to the wrong quantity.

items.prompt: succeeds across symbolic, table, verbal, and simple contextual applied-percent representations
items.expected_evidence: judge whether a resulting price, quantity, or measurement is reasonable relative to the original amount
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves applied-percent meaning across multiple representations and contexts.
